title: HBTU Kanpur Honest Review 🔥 | Admission Process, Cutoff, Fee, Placement & CSE Average Package
body:
This person doesn't know anything about the NIRF ranking, placements and other aspects of a good college.
He is just quoting his past experiences. If a college was good in terms of placements, infrastructure, resources, etc., five years ago, then it doesn't mean that that college will necessarily be performing at the same rate five years later.

I mean he is just sharing his past beliefs and experiences.

The placements, NIRF rankings, infrastructure, and resources change with time.

For e.g., if there's a new IIT and its ranking is lower than some well-renowned govt colleges then it doesn't mean that this IIT will always be lagging behind these govt colleges.

Kabhi kabhi kuchch colleges aage jakar achcha perform kar jaate hain utne he time period me. And their placement statistics and rankings sometimes seem to be unreal and fake. This is just because people like him are never ready to embrace this reality.

Isne bhi apne time per kuchch engineering entrance exams diye honge aur uss past experience ke according iske kuchch beliefs ban gaye honge.

But most of the time he just ignores NIRF rankings and gives priority to placement statistics.

Remember placement statistics bhi kisi college ka suddenly changed ho sakta hai, to iska ye matlab nahi ki uss college ne kuchch alterations ki hain apne placement statistics me. Placements students ke performance per depend karta hai na ki college ke past per.

Similarly the NIRF ranking of a college can be suddenly improved but iska ye matlab nahi ki wo NIRF ranking kharid li gayi hai.

This person doesn't know anything about the parameters to rank a college.

You can see some of his videos jisme ye kabhi kabhi kuchch universities jaise ki MMMUT ko target kar raha jaise ki wo koi private college ho. The ranking and the placement statistics of MMMUT have significantly increased in the past few years. Ab iska ye to matlab nahi hai na ki ye fake hai ya isme kuchch alterations ki gayi hain.
Matlab kuchh bhi keh raha ye aadmi.
If it was so simple tab to bohot saare govt colleges ki rankings aur placements theek ho jaane chahiye the.

And you can see him saying that wo candidate jo almost 6K JEE Mains me Rank la raha wo HBTU me kyun aa gaya.
Well everyone has his/her own priorities while opting for engineering universities/colleges.

But ye apne he beliefs impose kar raha.

Well, I request you all to not just blindly follow this person.
Nowadays there are many choices available to us, I mean... If a student just wants to inquire about a college, he or she can do it on his/her own.
Why is there any need to just purchase his courses to opt for the engineering colleges/universities?
Nowadays everything is available on social media platforms.
You can watch many videos about the performance of a college or university on YouTube.
author: @anujmaurya7105

title: week in my life as a freshman at columbia university | exploring nyc, living alone

And its so true isn't it ? Because the best and the most enduring kind of happiness can only be found when one is at total peace with oneself.

title: week in my life as a freshman at columbia university | exploring nyc, living alone
body: Hi Jisoo! I'm a Sophomore at Columbia and I definitly relate to the spending a lot of time alone part! I commend you for taking the time to go out and explore the city alone! I will definitely try exploring more this semester <3 lmk if you ever want an exploring buddy :)

title: week in my life as a freshman at columbia university | exploring nyc, living alone
body: I love your point about loneliness! Other than the fact I'm an only child raised by WAY OLDER parents (so not relatable to them), I spent about 3 weeks last year in Europe, alone! I also touristed NYC alone as well. We depend on no one to be happy, we can explore alone and be happy alone
author: @thiagogregory1

title: week in my life as a freshman at columbia university | exploring nyc, living alone
body: i developed  severe panic attacks in October 2022. i found hanging out with someone helped reduce the chance of panic attack. but, problem is i could only depend on that person twice. again, i found myself by myself again and learned i would be responsible to dealing with my panic attacks and cannot rely on the presence of another to reduce the likelihood of it occuring. So, in January I restructured my lifestyle with exercise and deep-breathing, knowing if i did not get my panic attacks under control, i would develop agoraphobia and would not leave my house. my classes take attendance & so there was no option to not become stronger and embrace my independence. i guess we are our own heroes. <3 thanks for sharing your story at the end.
author: @Jyeah89
